title: SulfiDish Radio
description: A beautiful Touhou-inspired Minecraft radio HUD mod for Gensokyo Radio with live track info, adaptive album art, visualizer, customizable layout, and full English / Russian support. ♪
body:
# SulfiDish Radio 🎵

**SulfiDish Radio** — A fan-made **Minecraft** mod dedicated to the beloved [Gensokyo Radio](https://gensokyoradio.net/), the finest Touhou **music** station.

This mod brings the magic of [Gensokyo Radio](https://gensokyoradio.net/) directly into your **Minecraft** experience with a beautiful **anime**-**styled** **HUD** overlay that dances to the rhythm of Touhou **music**.
And they **dynamically** change their interface to match the album cover.

![SulfiDish Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a325763b903d54a2fbf679e4bafbbe67933f420d.png)
![SulfiDish Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff448266f5a73bf831d37d7e5ec83dc05f0b14f0.png)![SulfiDish Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a005cf28da675397b14810dca6e65d7577fa210.png)![SulfiDish Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7a27bb3110b8c7864f0a9e2da7a3ca9517fb59.png)
## **Features**:

- **Real-time track info** — song title, artist, album, circle, and year displayed live

- **Adaptive album art** — cover art is fetched and rendered with smooth levitation animation, and the entire **HUD** color scheme **dynamically** adapts to the album's palette

- **Audio visualizer** — a colorful bar visualizer that pulses with the music, themed to match the current album art

- **Smooth jelly**-like notifications — track changes, connection events, **pause**/**resume** — all delivered with gentle floating and soft blink **animations**
**Pause** & **resume** **controls** — stop and start the radio stream at any time with instant feedback

- **Progress bar** — see how far into the current song you are, with elapsed/remaining time

- **Listener count** — see how many others are tuned in

- **Customizable layout** — 4 position options (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right)

- **Toggleable elements** — album art, progress bar, listeners count, and rating can each be turned **on**/**off**


**Bilingual interface** — full **Russian** and **English** support, switchable in-game 💗

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01214ddee37d25a4e709152551d2408b9985ad3f.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab028f6e6b804647a0a41288a4983219e61f3e01.png)

Toggle **HUD** visibility (default: H)
Toggle settings menu (default: J)
All keybinds are configurable in Minecraft's controls settings.

# IMPORTANT 💡

This is an unofficial fan project and is not affiliated with [Gensokyo Radio](https://gensokyoradio.net/).

Personally, I absolutely love this radio stream—I’ve been listening to it for a couple of years now. I was originally inspired by [CraftGR](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftgr), and I’ll include a link to them here because I really respect them; they deserve all the credit, and I’ve simply followed in the footsteps of this wonderful mod, so be sure to check out their mod. 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

New streams (radio) will be added in the future - or perhaps they have already been added.

</details>
